# Eng Amr Khaled Portfolio

Eng Amr Khaled is an AI product builder, React front-end developer, and programming/robotics trainer at Tekatech based in Mansoura, Egypt.

Main portfolio: https://amrkhaledabozeid.vercel.app/
Featured work: Ecosense AI, education platforms, business websites, Firebase reviews, React/Vite interfaces, SEO-ready UI, API integration, and IoT/ESP32-CAM hardware workflows.

Important URLs:
- Homepage: https://amrkhaledabozeid.vercel.app/
- CV: https://amrkhaledabozeid.vercel.app/Amr-Khaled-CV.pdf
- Sitemap: https://amrkhaledabozeid.vercel.app/sitemap.xml
